articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Trump lambasts Pope Leo XIV, extending feud over Iran war with American pontiff - NPR
articles.description: President Donald Trump delivered an extraordinary broadside against Pope Leo XIV on Sunday night, saying he didn't think the U.S.-born global leader of the Catholic Church is "doing a very good job."
